mapper.sql: AA.TV_SEQ , AA.YT_URL , AA.SORT_ORD , AA.TITLE , AA.HASHTAG , AA.VIEWS , AA.YT_DTTM , AA.USE_YN , AA.DEL_YN , AA.CONTENT , AA.RGTR , TO_CHAR(AA.RGT_DTTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS RGT_DTTM , AA.CHNR , TO_CHAR(AA.CHNG_DTTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS CHNG_DTTM , AA.CATEGORY
mapper.select:
/* com.erns.coching.cochingtv.mapper.CochingtvDAO.getListCount */
SELECT COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM T_CH_TV AA
mapper.update:
/* com.erns.coching.cochingtv.mapper.CochingtvDAO.updateOrderWhenInsert */
UPDATE T_CH_TV T SET SORT_ORD = SUB.RN FROM ( SELECT TV_SEQ, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY SORT_ORD ASC) AS RN FROM T_CH_TV ) SUB WHERE T.TV_SEQ = SUB.TV_SEQ
